query: Find 10 buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones and have status FA, sorted by bygningid ascending.

2.description: get 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: get FA-status buildings in Drammen municipality

5.description: deduplicate to one row per building
